3.anchor: Nineveh was an exceedingly great city,
3.note: Hebrew a great city to God
Or a visit was a three days’ journey

1.note: Hebrew it was exceedingly evil to Jonah

6.anchor: and made it come up over Jonah, that it might be a shade over his head, to save him from his discomfort.

2.note: The same Hebrew word can mean evil disaster
